title: The Brain, Body, and Behaviour Dataset (1.0.0) - Experiment 1
description: The Brain, Body, and Behaviour Dataset (BBBD) is a multimodal physiological dataset comprising 27 subjects across two sessions during educational video viewing. Experiment 1 focuses on eye-tracking measurements including gaze position, pupil size, blinks, saccades, and fixations recorded while subjects watched five informative videos under attentive (with post-video testing) and distracted (with concurrent counting task) conditions. This dataset supports research on attention, learning, and cognitive engagement during multimedia presentation.
methods_description: Eye-tracking data were collected while subjects viewed five educational videos under two conditions: attentive (with subsequent multiple-choice questionnaires) and distracted (with concurrent backwards counting task). Raw recordings were converted from .mat files to .bdf format for EEG and .tsv.gz format for physiological and eye-tracking data using MATLAB. Derived data include processed eye-tracking metrics (saccades, fixations, blinks with associated rates) and filtered pupil/gaze signals.
